
## Brachiopoda
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
load_and_plot(1)
```


## Crustacea
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 2:11){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Echinoderms
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 12:37){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Fish, Rays & Skates
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 38:39){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Jellies
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 43:47){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Molluscs
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 48:56){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Seaspiders
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 57:58){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Worms
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 59:71){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```

## Unidentified classifications
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE, fig.dim=c(10,10)}
for(i in 40:42){
  load_and_plot(i)
}
```
